Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: Represents an independent accounting entity or business dossier within the ComptaFisc-DZ application, often corresponding to a company or individual managed by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tenant entity.

name.description: The official name of the tenant (e.g., company name, individual name).

nif.description: The National Tax Identification Number (NIF) of the tenant.

rc.description: The Commercial Register Number (RC) of the tenant, if applicable.

activityType.description: The type of business activity (e.g., Production, Services, Trading).

taxRegime.description: The Algerian tax regime for this entity.

address.description: The physical address of the tenant.

email.description: The primary contact email address for the tenant.

phoneNumber.description: The primary contact phone number for the tenant.

creationDate.description: The date and time when this tenant profile was created.

currency.description: The primary operating currency for this tenant (e.g., DZD for Algerian Dinar).

fiscalHealthScore.description: A calculated score (0-100) indicating the fiscal health and compliance of the tenant.

lastFiscalHealthUpdate.description: The date and time when the fiscal health score was last calculated or updated.

userIds.description: An array of user IDs who have access to manage this tenant. (Relationship: Tenant N:N User)

members.description: A map of user IDs to their roles in the tenant (e.g., {userId: 'owner'}).

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific Tenant.
